data.title: Microservice Architecture
data.description: Netflix employs a microservice architecture that allows independent development and deployment of services.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed services using REST APIs, microservice orchestration with Kubernetes.

data.title: Global CDN Distribution
data.description: Utilizes a globally distributed content delivery network to ensure low latency and high availability for users across different regions.
data.technical_spec: Edge servers strategically placed worldwide, content caching mechanisms.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Leverages cloud platforms for scalable storage and computing power to handle large traffic volumes.
data.technical_spec: Amazon Web Services (AWS) with auto-scaling groups and load balancers.

data.title: Data-Driven Architecture
data.description: Relies on extensive data analytics and machine learning models for personalized content recommendation.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka for streaming data, Hadoop for big data processing.

data.title: Resilient System Design
data.description: Incorporates fault-tolerant designs to enhance uptime and robustness.
data.technical_spec: Circuit breaker patterns and chaos engineering via Simian Army.
